public class DataModelFilter

Constructors
  NameDescription
DataModelFilter
Initializes a new instance of the DataModelFilter class
Top
Properties
  NameDescription
Delimiter
Returns the delimiter string that can be used to join multiple filter values. If this is null, filter values are mutually exclusive and cannot be combined.
Description
Returns an optional descriptive text for this filter.
Name
Returns the technical identifier for this filter, which is the URL parameter name.
